notes: 2026-07-10 nightly: DECISIVE ACTION after 12+ sessions holding discipline. CM Sling Shot (post-2026-06-25 rebuild) now n=21 closed and the verdict is in: EV -9.2%/trade, -193% total (vs OLD pre-rebuild system +11.6% EV / +405% over 35). Root cause isolated: ENTRY TYPE. Aggressive (pullback-to-fast-EMA) entries n=19: -198% total, only 4/19 positive, EV -10.4%. Conservative (confirmed EMA re-cross) entries n=2: both positive, EV +2.4%. EVERY blowup was aggressive: ETH x3 (-54.5/-32.3/-38.6, all aggressive longs), BNB x2, INJ x2, SOL, DOGE. CHANGE 1 (trader.py score_setup): hard-gate to require has_conservative; aggressive setups now return score 0. Removes the entire demonstrated loss book; keeps the confirmation entries that at least aren't losing. Freq drops to ~2 signals/week (only 2 of 21 recent were conservative) — acceptable: better no trade than -EV trade. Revisit if conservative EV underperforms over next 10 closes. CHANGE 2: MIN_ADX reverted 40->30 (trader.py bonus threshold; hard gate stays 25) AND review.py MIN_ADX auto-adjust block DISABLED — FOURTH blended-metric regression (after MIN_SCORE, TP_RATIO, SESSION). It ratcheted 30->35 (Jul 8, v1.10.1) ->40 (Jul 9, v1.11.0) using low_wr with result=='tp' (mislabels trail-SL winners as losses) over blended all_trades. Post-rebuild CM data shows high-ADX trades did WORSE (ADX>35 EV -18.0% vs ADX<=35 ~breakeven), so the ratchet premise was also backwards. Memory pre-authorized disabling on first wrong fire. NOT CHANGED: MIN_SCORE=6 (conservative+4H-aligned auto-clears 6; no gating benefit to raising), TRAIL_PCT=8% (ATOM June short banked +76.1% TP via trail after 320h — the alpha engine, untouched), TP_RATIO=2.0, MAX_TRADES=1, SESSION 11-24, WATCHLIST 14 (no coin meets removal bar under conservative-only yet). FLAGGED for next session, NOT fixed tonight (one-bug-one-fix discipline): (a) ETH -54.5% loss exceeded the MAX_LEV_LOSS=25 cap — SL at 1.29% x ~20x should cap ~26%, but price exited 1.44% past the SL trigger (slippage/gap-through on fast move); two ETH July trades also show identical exit 1800.15 (possible ghost/exit-classification artifact). Investigate executor SL execution and consider lowering MAX_LEVERAGE from 25. (b) Drawdown -82.1% is severe; with conservative-only + leverage review, expect it to stop growing. Transient: 'Another instance already running PID 240189' at 23:02 was the 23:00 review restart overlap (single occurrence, clean restart 23:03), not the orphan-spam pattern — no action.
